title: Two Blocks Ahead
body:
Here’s the Two Blocks Ahead Mod. It introduces two unsettling new mobs: Big Sickocado and Small Sickocado. Small Sickocado is harmless, but Big Sickocado only shows up at night and reacts to your hunger. When your hunger is above 75%, you’ll just hear him around. If it drops to between 75% and 50%, you might catch glimpses of him. From 50% to 25%, he’ll get even closer, with sounds that’ll make you uneasy. But if your hunger falls below 25%, he goes into hunting mode and will come straight for you.

**Required Mod: [GeckoLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib/versions)**


<iframe width="373" height="210" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/tlOPB2m3_Z4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


Disclaimer: This mod is optimized for Forge. As my channel grows, I’ll revisit and port mods like this to Fabric, Neo, and other platforms in the future.

Note: There are quite a few bugs with this mod, especially when playing multiplayer versus single-player, so please report any issues in the comments section on my Patreon and bear with me as I work through them!
